name: codex-coding-workflows
description: Add planning, task-loop discipline, adversarial verification, review-ready summaries, handoff summaries, and ship-readiness workflows to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, track, verify, and audit coding work
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Coding Workflows to add explicit planning, task-loop discipline, adversarial verification, review-ready and handoff summary artifacts, and ship-readiness audit skills to local coding sessions without claiming runtime features Codex core does not expose today.
defaultPrompt: Use $review-ready-summary to turn the current workflow state into a reviewer-facing summary.
Use $handoff-summary to generate a clean handoff from the current task, memory, and verification state.
Use $workflow-state-repair to repair malformed .codex-workflows state before relying on it.
